subject: Timburr — a small humanoid-like Pokemon resting against stacked wooden planks or lumber
description: A stocky, small humanoid-like creature with a distinctive rounded head and grey coloring sits or leans against a stack of cut wooden planks or lumber boards. The creature's posture is relaxed, leaning on the timber it carries as its signature prop. The scene is lit warmly with muted beige and tan tones suggesting an outdoor or construction-adjacent setting. The lumber occupies significant visual real estate, clearly central to the composition.
foreground: small grey humanoid-like creature leaning on stacked wooden boards
background: stacked lumber planks, warm muted background
emotion: calm, resting — relaxed posture leaning on lumber
